name: chatbot-ai
description: Full-stack task management chatbot with AI assistance
author: Your Name

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
